work.desc_title: Thirty-five Chapters on the Monastic Life by Isaac the Syrian
creator: ark:/21198/s19888
ark:/21198/s1qp4m

excerpt.as_written: في معانى تزيل الظلام عن العقول وتجلوا الصدا عن الباب
translation: In a proverbial sense of removing darkness from rational minds and polishing the rust from [the door]...

excerpt.as_written: لساياي المواهب والخلاص بدل كل سُبح وشكر في زمان الواجب الذي له المجد وعلينا رحمته الى دهر الداهرين امين
translation: …to seek these gifts and salvation, instead of every praise and thanks at the necessary time, to whom be the glory and upon us his mercy to the age of ages. Amen

contents.label: Preface and panegyric by ʿAbdallāh ibn al-Faḍl, ff. 001v - 003r
First section of Mar Isaac, ff. 003r - 014v
Another section in the movement of the body, ff. 100v - 102v

note: The text is a translation of Isaac by ʿAbdallāh ibn al-Faḍl.

work_wit.as_written: قول القديس مر اسحق علي سيرة السكوت (f. 144r)

excerpt.as_written: حبّ السكوت يا خي بحرص لانّ فيه تجد نفسك الحياه
translation: Love silence eagerly, my brother, for you will find life in it for yourself

excerpt.as_written: وتقدم نحن السُبح لاذليتك وتفرح في السموات الملايكه علي رجوع الخاطى امين
translation: We give praise for your humility, and the angels rejoice in heaven for the return of the sinner. Amen

work.desc_title: Creed from the words of ʿAbdallāh b. al-Faḍl b. ʿAbdallāh
creator: ark:/21198/s1qp4m

excerpt.as_written: اومن بالاه واحد ضابط كُلّ ازليّ لا مبدا له بالكليّه
translation: I believe in one God, the Almighty, eternal, who has no beginning in His entire being…

excerpt.as_written: واحطي بخلاصه بحوده الدي له يليق المجد والاكرام والسجود مع ابيه الدى لا مبدا له وروحه الكلى القدس والمحيي الان ودايما والى اباد الدهور امين وامين
translation: And surround those at His side with His salvation, to Whom belongs the glory, honor, and worship with His Father who has no beginning and the ever and Life-giving Holy Spirit, now, always, and to the end of the ages. Amen and amen

work.desc_title: An exhortation to the chief Egyptian fathers

excerpt.as_written: احتال ان تقتني هده الكلمه كذلك ايضا وهده الضحك والمشي
translation: I have striven to take hold of this word, as well, too, of this laughter and this walk

excerpt.as_written: حين وفي كل ايام حياتك رد الى الله عقلك بشكر دايم
translation: During and in all the days of your lives, respond to God and be reasonable with thanks always

excerpt.as_written: ايها الاخ الحبيب الدى قد اشتاق بحرارة المحبّه ان يكون لله ويكون بلا خطيه
translation: O beloved brother who yearns with the fervor of love to be with God and without sin

excerpt.as_written: كالمقول اسرر لي ولبني بيتي السبح الذي بروح قدسه حكّم اميتّنا بها ولى الي الدهر امين
translation: As it is said, “Take pleasure in me and my children.” Glory be to Him with the Holy Spirit who judges our lives and has authority over them into eternity. Amen

work.desc_title: Views of three saints: Gregory the Theologian, Basil the Great, and John Chrysostom

excerpt.as_written: ليس يوجب العقوبه علي احدنا مشابهته رذيلة الخطاه فقط
translation: It is not necessary to punish one of us whose likeness is merely as the vice of sinners…

excerpt.as_written: فاجتهد في ان تربح اوليك بصلاتك وبطريقتك الحصده من الان وكل اوان والى دهر الداهرين امين
translation: So strive to profit first by your prayers and your methods of the harvest from now and all time and to the age of ages. Amen

contents.label: Profitable counsels of John Chrysostom, ff. 159r - 182r
Spiritual teaching of the holy fathers, ff. 184r - 188r

note: The text is divided into several rubricized subsections
